description_long: This is a compact, single-story bungalow situated on a rectangular green plot, featuring a modern, boxy design with clean lines and a flat roof. The exterior is predominantly white, with large rectangular windows and a main entrance visible on the front facade. The structure includes a main living area and a smaller attached section, likely serving as an auxiliary room or garage. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some grouped together and others spaced apart, contributing to a contemporary aesthetic. The building sits low to the ground, with no visible steps or raised foundation, and there is no porch or veranda present. The overall appearance is minimalist, with a focus on geometric forms and functional layout.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof and asymmetrical window arrangement, set on a green rectangular plot. The design is minimalist and boxy, with no porch and clean, geometric lines.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and the primary facade of the bungalow.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated green plot and the side wall with minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow, with fewer windows and a simple, flat exterior.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the secondary section of the building and additional windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and spaced windows
